issue_summary: Customer can authenticate but cannot view the analytics dashboard after a recent update.
recommended_response: Thanks for reporting this. We are checking whether your dashboard issue is related to yesterday's release. Please try clearing your browser cache and using an incognito window while we investigate.
next_steps: Check browser console logs if available.
Confirm whether other users in the same account are affected.
Escalate to engineering if issue persists after cache reset.
